title: susilkumara rhomboidea
side_effects: Susilkumara rhomboidea can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions in some individuals, which may manifest as hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds can also lead to liver damage, including conditions like hepatitis and cirrhosis. Furthermore, misuse of the plant can cause gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, excessive consumption of Susilkumara rhomboidea may trigger anaphylactic shock, a life-threatening medical emergency.
